title: Codereview pass 3: relay_seen needs unit test for LRU eviction
description: No unit test exists for the relay_seen LRU eviction behavior. Consider adding a test that: (1) adds 129 unique payloads, (2) verifies the oldest payload is no longer in the cache, (3) verifies the newest 128 remain. This would prevent regression of the bulk-clear bug.
close_reason: Test coverage suggestion - deferred to future work
